en.extract:
The Vella Lavella white-eye, belted white-eye, or banded white-eye (Zosterops vellalavella) is a species of bird in the family Zosteropidae. It is endemic to the Solomon Islands.
Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. It is threatened by habitat loss.

The '''[[Vella Lavella]] white-eye''', '''belted white-eye''', or '''banded white-eye''' ('''''Zosterops vellalavella''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Zosteropidae]]. It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to the [[Solomon Islands]].

Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s. It is threatened by [[habitat loss]].
